'''Kuk'tar''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kothlis system/Legends|Kothlis system]]. It was a chaotic inhospitable world. Kuk'tar was a tiny planetoid with irregular [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] that teared the planet's surface to shreds. The proximity of the planet to its [[Koth'lar|sun]] caused seering temperatures.<ref name="SotEPG" />
